strengths: 14+ years full-stack experience well beyond 6-year requirement; proven TypeScript, Node.js, React expertise at Optilyz and current Staff role
Current role directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure (a required skill); strong AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and infrastructure experience
Excellent communication and mentorship demonstrated through workshops (FOSS4G, Web Internals, Selenium courses); strong software craftsmanship and TDD philosophy
concerns: Nest.js framework not mentioned despite being in primary stack; resume shows Node.js/Express/GraphQL instead
Testing framework specificity (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not detailed; TDD mindset evident but framework expertise unclear
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned; resume shows MongoDB, MySQL, SQL but not the specific relational database in job requirements
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 14+ years in the field and direct expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS). His current role explicitly focuses on AI-agent infrastructure, addressing a key required skill. Primary gaps are Nest.js framework (not evidenced on resume) and specific testing framework details (Jest/Vitest/Playwright). PostgreSQL isn't mentioned, though SQL competency is clear. For a Mid-Senior IC role emphasizing agentic workflows and full-stack capability, he represents an overqualified profile with learnable framework gaps.
